title: hieracium nigrescens subsp. uralense
intro: Hieracium nigrescens subsp. uralense is a subspecies of the Hieracium genus, commonly known as the hawkweed, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium nigrescens subsp. uralense include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain, as well as its potential to improve digestion and boost the immune system. The plant is typically used to prepare herbal infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
